    ps.improvement_building_count,
    ps.acres,

  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
  WHERE lower(COALESCE(ps.situs_city_state_zip, '')) LIKE '%marblemount%'
), filtered AS (
  SELECT parcel_number, land_use, land_use_code, improvement_building_count, acres, has_geometry

cases.prompt: lots in sedro-woolley or marbelmount that are over 1 acre with utilities and no improvements.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parcel_number,
    ps.acres,
    ps.land_use,
    ps.improvement_building_count,
    TRIM(a."Utilities") AS utilities,
    LOWER(COALESCE(ps.city_name, '')) AS city_name_lower,
    LOWER(COALESCE(ps.situs_city_state_zip, '')) AS situs_city_lower
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
  LEFT JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/assessor.parquet') AS a
    ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(a."Parcel Number")
  WHERE
    ps.acres > 1
    AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) = 0
    AND TRIM(COALESCE(a."Utilities", '')) <> ''
    AND (
      city_name_lower = 'sedro-woolley'
      OR situs_city_lower LIKE '%sedro woolley%'
      OR situs_city_lower LIKE '%sedro-woolley%'
      OR city_name_lower = 'marblemount'
      OR situs_city_lower LIKE '%marblemount%'
    )
)
SELECT
  parcel_number,
  acres,
  improvement_building_count,
  utilities
FROM base

cases.prompt: less than 2 acre parcels with no utilities and no exemptions, not in flood plain.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parcel_number,
    ps.acres,
    TRIM(a."Utilities") AS utilities,
    TRIM(a."Exemptions") AS exemptions,
    ps.has_geometry
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
  LEFT JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/assessor.parquet') a
    ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(a."Parcel Number")
  WHERE ps.acres < 2
), filtered AS (
  SELECT
    parcel_number,
    acres,
    utilities,
    exemptions,
    has_geometry
  FROM base
  WHERE (utilities IS NULL OR utilities = '' OR lower(utilities) = 'none')
    AND (exemptions IS NULL OR exemptions = '')
)
SELECT
  parcel_number,
  acres,
  utilities,
  exemptions,
  has_geometry
FROM filtered

cases.prompt: low quality homes in sedro-woolly on lots between 1-3 acres. residential zones only
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH low_quality_improvements AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(i.ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number, string_agg(DISTINCT TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd), ' | ') AS quality_codes
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') AS i
  WHERE TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSL'
  GROUP BY parcel_number
),
residential_parcels AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number,
    ps.land_use,
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) AS land_use_code,
    ps.acres,
    ps.zoning_code_short,
    ps.zoning_label,
    ps.city_name,
    ps.situs_city_state_zip
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
  WHERE (
    lower(COALESCE(ps.city_name, '')) = 'sedro-woolley'
    OR lower(COALESCE(ps.situs_city_state_zip, '')) LIKE '%sedro woolley%'
    OR lower(COALESCE(ps.situs_city_state_zip, '')) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%'
  )
  AND land_use_code IN (110, 111, 112, 113)
  AND ps.acres BETWEEN 1 AND 3
  AND (
    ps.zoning_code_short IN ('R_1', 'R_5', 'R_7', 'R_15', 'RI', 'RRv', 'RVR', 'URR', 'BR-R', 'R')
    OR lower(COALESCE(ps.zoning_label, '')) LIKE '%residential%'
    OR (
      ps.zoning_code_short = 'CITY'
      AND lower(COALESCE(ps.city_name, '')) = 'sedro-woolley'
      AND land_use_code IN (111, 112, 113)
    )
  )
)
SELECT rp.parcel_number, rp.land_use, rp.acres, rp.zoning_code_short, rp.zoning_label, rp.city_name, rp.situs_city_state_zip, lqi.quality_codes
FROM residential_parcels AS rp
JOIN low_quality_improvements AS lqi ON rp.parcel_number = lqi.parcel_number
ORDER BY rp.parcel_number
